notes: Word ranges assumem ~150 wpm speech (2.5 wps). Adjust per format tone: conversational ~130wpm, rapid/punchy ~170wpm.

formats.name: Advertorial editorial (1500 words)
formats.structure: Zakaria 7-section (hook → story → pivot → mechanism → proof → offer → close)
formats.compliance_notes: Meta scraper lê LP — mesma rigor do ad copy

formats.name: Email welcome sequence (5 emails)
formats.structure: E1 story hook, E2 mechanism deeper, E3 social proof, E4 objection break, E5 CTA with guarantee
formats.tone: personal, conversational, segmented by signup trigger

formats.name: Organic TikTok post (20s)
formats.structure: hook (2s) → payoff tease (5s) → mechanism glimpse (8s) → soft pointer (5s)
formats.compliance_notes: TikTok organic is less strict but watch age-restricted topics (beauty mentions of injectables auto-flag)

formats.name: SEO blog post
formats.structure: H1 with keyword → intro hook → H2 mechanism explained → H2 symptoms/triggers → H2 solutions → H2 product mention (soft) → H2 FAQ → CTA
formats.tone: informational, authoritative, optimized for featured snippet
formats.compliance_notes: Google E-E-A-T, YMYL considerations, schema markup

formats.name: Pinterest carousel (8 pins)
formats.structure: Pin 1: hook visual + claim. Pin 2-3: problem. Pin 4-5: mechanism. Pin 6-7: solution/product. Pin 8: CTA saved link
formats.compliance_notes: Pinterest restricts before/after weight/beauty claims heavily

formats.name: YouTube pre-roll (15s non-skippable)
formats.compliance_notes: YouTube/Google Ads medical device + drug claim strict

formats.name: SMS welcome message
formats.note: SMS uses chars not words — length_chars is canonical
formats.compliance_notes: TCPA compliant, STOP to opt-out, sender ID

formats.name: Package insert card (physical)
formats.structure: Welcome headline → 3-step how-to-use → secondary benefit → referral invitation
formats.compliance_notes: Physical collateral — FDA cosmetic labeling rules apply if making claims

formats.name: Podcast host-read ad (30s audio)
formats.structure: host transition (5s) → problem framing (8s) → mechanism (10s) → CTA + promo code (7s)
formats.compliance_notes: Audio-only so no visual claims but verbal claims still subject to FTC
